semantic.role: Data Access Object (DAO) for violation records in the SQLite-based index database.
responsibilities: Persist new architectural rule violations to the 'violations' table.
Delete all violation records associated with a given file path.
Delete violation records for rule IDs that are no longer active (orphan cleanup).
Retrieve all currently active violations ordered by severity and detection time.
outOfScope: Domain logic for rule evaluation or violation detection.
invariants: All database operations use prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Violations are stored in a 'violations' table with columns: file_path, rule_id, severity, reason, detected_at.
Retrieved violations are sorted by severity descending, then detected_at descending.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable data-access layer for managing lifecycle of architectural rule violations in the index database.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added deleteOrphanViolations to remove violations for rules that are no longer active, implementing violation lifecycle management.

publicSurface.description: Inserts a new violation record into the 'violations' table with file path, rule ID, severity, reason, and current timestamp.
Deletes all violation records associated with a given file path.
Deletes all violation records whose rule_id is not in the provided list of active rule IDs, returning the count of deleted rows.
Returns all violation records sorted by severity (descending) and detection time (descending).

semantic.driftReason: Public surface expanded: added deleteOrphanViolations function, introducing lifecycle management for violations linked to deactivated rules. Previous contract did not include this symbol or capability.

English.role: Data Access Object (DAO) for violation records in the SQLite-based index database.
responsibilities: Insert violation records into the 'violations' table.
Delete all violations associated with a given file path.
Delete violations for rule IDs that are no longer in the active set.
Fetch all current violations ordered by severity and detection time.
outOfScope: Domain logic for rule evaluation or violation detection.

exports.name: recordViolation
exports.signature:
recordViolation(
  db: Database.Database,
  filePath: string,
  ruleId: string,
  severity: string,
  reason: string,
)
